---
title: "test_atomic_gpt_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_atomic_gpt_empire.py"
loc: 23
complexity: 2
logic_score: 4.20
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.75
---

## Intent
The `test_atomic_gpt_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_anomaly_warden_forward_empire, test_anomaly_warden_train_step_empire, test_session_warden_forward_empire. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_anomaly_warden_forward_empire, test_anomaly_warden_train_step_empire, test_session_warden_forward_empire. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.core.engine.atomic_gpt](file://src.core.engine.atomic_gpt)

### Exports
- `test_anomaly_warden_forward_empire`
- `test_anomaly_warden_train_step_empire`
- `test_session_warden_forward_empire`
